response.global_summary: The video captures a live concert atmosphere featuring Tokino Sora. The first part (00:00-02:13) consists of audience anticipation and an introductory video for the 'Dreams in Motion 2026' event. Following the intro, Tokino Sora performs her song '未完成の地図' (Mikansei no Chizu) live on stage from 02:13 until the end of the video.

scenes.description: Concert audience waving light sticks in the dark, with an introductory 'Dreams in Motion 2026' video playing on screens.
Tokino Sora performs '未完成の地図' live on stage, accompanied by vibrant stage visuals and the audience waving light sticks.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og: 未完成の地図を 輝きに変えて\n誰にも真似できない 足跡を 見てて ねぇ\n[...Remaining lyrics from live performance...]
scenes.reference_lyrics_en: Turning this incomplete map into brilliance,\nWatching the footprints that no one else can imitate, hey.\n[...Remaining lyrics from live performance...]
